hero.title: Ganzhi.NET
hero.subtitle: Lunar conversion, minute-precision solar terms, Ganzhi four pillars, zodiac and lunar festivals — covering 1901-2100, astronomically computed and cross-verified. Zero dependencies, offline.

lunar.title: Lunar Conversion 1901-2100
lunar.desc: Bidirectional Gregorian↔lunar conversion; leap months explicitly flagged, non-existent dates gracefully rejected via TryToSolar.

terms.title: Minute-precision Solar Terms
terms.desc: Computed from the full-precision VSOP87D ephemeris, verified minute-by-minute against USNO and observatory data; Taiwan time UTC+8.

ganzhi.title: Ganzhi Four Pillars
ganzhi.desc: Year/month/day/hour pillars: selectable LiChun or Lunar-New-Year year boundary, month pillars switch at exact term times, late-Zi rule included.

festivals.title: Zodiac & Lunar Festivals
festivals.desc: New Year's Eve, Lunar New Year, Lantern, Dragon Boat, Mid-Autumn and more — incl. the Laba two-or-zero-per-year edge case.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.intro: Pick a topic below to get started with Ganzhi.NET.
docs.wip: Page content coming soon — see README.md in the GitHub repo.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.intro: See docs/en/changelog.md in the GitHub repo for the full history.

sponsor.title: Sponsor
sponsor.intro: If Ganzhi.NET helps you, consider sponsoring the developer via cryptocurrency or Binance Pay.

usdt.title: USDT (BEP20)
usdt.warningTitle: BSC (Binance Smart Chain / BEP20) network only
usdt.warningBody: Sending to other networks (ERC20 / TRC20 / Solana, etc.) will result in permanent loss of funds.

binancePay.title: Binance Pay
binancePay.desc: Scan to sponsor via Binance Pay
